title: Gulf India Crisis Resource Hub
story: Orchestrated a fully autonomous agentic workflow to build, deploy, and self-update an emergency resource hub for Indian expats during the 2026 Gulf Crisis in under an hour.
highlights: Autonomous hourly monitoring with two-tier auto-deploy
Real-time crisis data for 9 embassies, 12+ airlines, 7 airports
42 visitors within 15 minutes of launch at 6 AM

title: AI-Powered Code Review Agent
story: Built an intelligent code review agent that analyzes pull requests for security vulnerabilities, performance issues, and style violations — integrated directly into the CI/CD pipeline.
highlights: Custom fine-tuned model for team-specific patterns

title: AI Travel Content Engine
story: A content generation platform that transforms raw travel footage metadata into polished social media posts, captions, and hashtag strategies — optimized for engagement.
highlights: Batch processing for content calendar workflows
